历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including old science college entrance exam) was approximately 8314 → 10143 → 13860 → 35727 → 11210, showing an overall backward trend, with a baseline of about 11210 in 2025; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination major group division, a special group with low ranking appeared, and in 2025 it returned to the main major group at 11210; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 65 students from 2021 to 2023, 61 in 2024, and increased to 70 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 64 students, a reduction of about 8.6% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (average), with moderate short video exposure and stable application attention; Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), and Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional flagship; highly correlated with the enrollment majors such as Materials, Textiles, and Chemistry, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other key enrollment major categories at Donghua University have consistently high social popularity (all were highly recommended/recommended in 2024); the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (estimated Physics Category about 269,000), intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in the province is about 2.1%–2.4% (2024–2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11210, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 8.6%, the increase in provincial candidates of about 3.3%, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10584, with a range of 10084–11084.

- Computer Class
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Physics Class (Integrated Circuits and New Energy)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class
- Textile Engineering (Art-Engineering Integration Dual Degree)
- Chemistry Class
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (New Energy and Energy Storage Technology Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 10084–11084, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10000), focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Class and Artificial Intelligence; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 11000), mainly choose Tier 3 advantageous majors like Materials Class and Textiles Class, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2024 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category dropped from approximately 7633 to 1676. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao, the professional group division resulted in a higher ranking (7633), but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 1676, with a baseline of about 1676. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 6 students in 2024 and increased to 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranks 96th (average), with moderate short video exposure and stable application attention. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), but not directly related to History Category majors. The Economics and Management Experimental Class, Economics and Trade Category, and Journalism and Communication Category are among the university's advantageous humanities and social science directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Economics and Management and Economics and Trade categories is divided and cautious, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% over 2025 (History Category estimated at about 123,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Guangxi examinees. The university has a small enrollment plan for History Category in this province (9 students), making competition relatively concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1676, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, an approximately 3.3% increase in provincial examinees, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1656, with a range of 1358 to 1954.
